This repository does not accept pull requests.

Reviewing pull requests costs maintainer time and money. This repository only allocates maintainer effort to reviewed issues with credible buyer interest, quote-approved work, or separately contracted professional services.

Please maintain your own fork if you need custom patches.

If you want a fix carried in this repository:

- open an early-access request and, if relevant, comment `I am interested in purchasing early access at the specified price`, or
- contact the maintainer for a quote for private/professional work
